title: Rumpy's Disk Collection
description: Adds more music disks with songs to the game!
body:
Rumpy's Disk Collection is a fairly small mod, only existing to add songs and discs to the game.

# Crafting in Place!
Now has crafting recipes for all disks, recipes may change in the future as I want to make a crafting station specifically for making disks. Also, advancements are in place to give you the recipes to make the disks as well!
